    N

    negative() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Returns the value of the negative record component.
    NOT - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes.ConditionToken.Type
     
    NotCondition - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions
    Condition that evaluates to the logical negation of an inner condition.
    NotCondition(ICondition) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.NotCondition
    Constructs a NotCondition wrapping another condition.
    NotNode - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes
     
    NotNode(ConditionNode) - Constructor for record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes.NotNode
    Creates an instance of a NotNode record class.
    NUMBER - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.lexing.TokenType
